name: session_search
description: Full-text search across past Velix conversation history using SQLite FTS5. Returns ranked snippets of matching turns from all persisted conversations.

query.description: Natural language or keyword query to search across past conversation turns

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10, max: 50)

mode.description: Scope of search. all=every conversation, user=user_conversation files only, proc=process conversation files only

user_id.description: If mode=user, optionally narrow to a specific user_id. Leave empty to search all users.

since_hours.description: Only return results from conversations active in the last N hours. 0 = no time filter.
